mapper.sql: c.candidate_id, c.name, c.avatar, c.phone, c.email, c.wechat, c.current_company, c.current_position, c.applied_position, c.job_requirements, c.recruitment_job_id, rj.job_name AS recruitment_job_name, c.stage, c.source, c.education, c.school, c.major, c.work_years, c.expected_city, c.expected_salary, c.skill_tags, c.resume_summary, c.ai_evaluation, c.owner_id, owner.realname AS owner_name, c.remark, c.last_contact_time, c.next_step_time, c.status, c.create_user_id, creator.realname AS create_user_name, c.create_time, c.update_time

sql.if: AND ( COALESCE(c.name, '') ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') OR COALESCE(c.phone, '') ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') OR COALESCE(c.email, '') ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') OR COALESCE(c.wechat, '') ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') OR COALESCE(c.current_company, '') ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') OR COALESCE(c.current_position, '') ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') OR COALESCE(c.applied_position, '') ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') OR COALESCE(c.job_requirements, '') ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') OR COALESCE(rj.job_name, '') ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') OR COALESCE(c.school, '') ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') OR COALESCE(c.skill_tags, '') ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') OR COALESCE(c.resume_summary, '') ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') )

choose.when: ORDER BY c.create_time ASCDESC, c.candidate_id DESC
ORDER BY c.next_step_time ASCDESC NULLS LAST, c.update_time DESC
ORDER BY c.last_contact_time ASCDESC NULLS LAST, c.update_time DESC
choose.otherwise: ORDER BY c.update_time DESC NULLS LAST, c.create_time DESC, c.candidate_id DESC

mapper.select: SELECT , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM crm_knowledge k WHERE k.candidate_id = c.candidate_id AND k.status != 2) AS resume_count, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM crm_schedule s WHERE s.candidate_id = c.candidate_id AND COALESCE(s.type, '') = 'interview') AS interview_count FROM crm_candidate c LEFT JOIN manager_user owner ON c.owner_id = owner.user_id LEFT JOIN manager_user creator ON c.create_user_id = creator.user_id LEFT JOIN crm_recruitment_job rj ON c.recruitment_job_id = rj.recruitment_job_id AND rj.del_flag = 0 WHERE

SELECT , c.ai_parse_snapshot, c.conflict_snapshot FROM crm_candidate c LEFT JOIN manager_user owner ON c.owner_id = owner.user_id LEFT JOIN manager_user creator ON c.create_user_id = creator.user_id LEFT JOIN crm_recruitment_job rj ON c.recruitment_job_id = rj.recruitment_job_id AND rj.del_flag = 0 WHERE c.candidate_id = #{candidateId} AND c.status = 1
